name: Hot Fried Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 Carrots, peeled and cut into thin slices
1 Red bell pepper, cut into thin slices
1 Red onion, peeled and cut into thin slices
recipeInstructions:
1. For the chicken: Season the chicken breasts with salt and pepper.
2. Prepare the breadcrumb mixture by placing flour on a sheet of wax paper, beating eggs with milk in a shallow bowl, and placing breadcrumbs on another sheet of wax paper.
3. Dip each chicken piece first in the flour (shaking off excess), then in the egg mixture, and finally in the breadcrumbs. Allow to sit for 10 minutes to set the crumbs.
4. Prepare salad ingredients: wash spinach, cut carrots, bell pepper, and onion into thin slices.
5. Arrange salad ingredients on individual plates or a serving platter.
6. For the dressing: In a bowl, combine honey, mustard, vinegar, salt, and pepper. Whisk until smooth, then slowly whisk in the olive oil.
7. Heat vegetable oil in a deep-sided pan over medium-high heat to 375°F (190°C).
8. Add chicken pieces carefully, frying for about 5 minutes or until golden brown. Fry in batches if necessary.
9. Remove chicken with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
10. Arrange chicken pieces on top of the salads and drizzle dressing over all.
11. Serves 6.
Note: If purchasing pre-breaded chicken nuggets, use them instead of frying the breasts.
